description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier — discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Functions as the immutable mathematical and behavioral bedrock that ensures the live platform's staking and penalty systems are theoretically sound and practically unexploitable.
ranked.first_task: Formalize the audit game theory specification into a distributable, easily consumable research paper or API-accessible document that can be directly referenced by the live Styx Commerce UI.
